case_title: HELEN DAI et al VS. MARK AQUINO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,550.00 FILED BY DAI, HELEN HAO, WANG WEI AS TO DEFENDANT AQUINO, MARK TANILYA, MAY D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT'S "ANSWER" TO PLAINTIFF'S SC-108, FILED.
SC-108 ANSWER, FILED.
SC-108 "ANSWER" RECEIVED & FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAI, HELEN HAO, WANG WEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AQUINO, MARK TANILYA, MAY D PLAINTIFF BROUGHT CAR WITHOUT CHECKING IT OUT FIRST & DEFENDANT HAS STORED CAR FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TO INFORM DMV RE: TRANSFER OF OWNERSHIP AND IS ORDERED TO DLIVER CAR TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELEN DAI, THIS IS A SECOND FILING OF SC-108 BY THE PLAINTIFF.
CORRECTED RULING IN SECOND SC-108 FILING BY PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED AUG-18-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TANILYA, MAY D
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PLAINTIFF'S 2ND SC-108 WITH DEFENDANT'S ANSWER SUBMITTED TO PRO TEM COMMISSIONER RUSSELL DAVIS.
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF, HELEN DAI. *3RD FILING OF SC-108 BY THE PLAINTIFF*. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAI, HELEN
SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER FILED, BY PLTFF.

ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED". PLAINTIFF ADVISED OF TITLE ISSUE PRIOR TO PURCHASE AND STILL BOUGHT CAR. PLAINTIFF WAS GIVENTHE CORRECT FORM TO FILE WITH DMV BUT DIDN'T. DEFENDANT IS NO LONGER REQUIRED TO PROVIDE TITLE. PER PRO TEM JUDGE RUSSELL DAVIS.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2009 - JUDGMENT.
AMENDED REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER, SC-108 FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAI, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT AQUINO, MARK TANILYA, MAY D
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-18-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AQUINO, MARK
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY DAI, HELEN AQUINO, MARK

ORDER ON SC-108, FILED. PER ORDER, DEFENDANT TO DELIVER CAR TO PLAINTIFF. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO DELIVER CAR TO PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1155.00. DELIVERY OR PAYMENT TO TAKE PLACE NO LATER THAN 30 DAYS FROM SERVICE OF THIS ORDER.

ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT SC-108A SECOND FILING BY PLAINTIFF. PER ORDER, DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH TITLE TO SUBJECT VEHICLE WITHIN 30 DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. TITLE IS NECESSARY FOR PLAINTIFF TO EITHER SELL OR REGISTER CAR.
